landing.heroSubtitle: Stay connected wherever you go. Instant activation, no physical SIM needed.

valueProps.instantActivationDesc: Activate your eSIM in minutes. No store visits, no waiting — just scan and connect.
valueProps.globalCoverageDesc: Stay online in 190+ countries with reliable local and regional data plans.
valueProps.affordableDesc: Save up to 90% compared to roaming fees. Pay only for the data you need.

seo.defaultTitle: Travel eSIM — Instant Mobile Data for 190+ Countries
seo.defaultDescription: Buy prepaid travel eSIMs online. Instant activation, affordable data plans, and global coverage for your next trip.
